hero.badge: New drops weekly — grab yours before they sell out.
hero.description: AYNAWAJ brings handpicked, high-quality footwear directly to you — no middlemen, no markups. Every pair is inspected before it ships. Your next favorite shoe is already here.

heritage.description: We started on Telegram selling shoes we genuinely stood behind. Every pair we list has been checked — stitching, sole, fit, finish. If it's on AYNAWAJ, it passed.

quality.title: Every Pair Inspected
quality.desc: We check stitching, sole adhesion, and finish on every pair before listing it. If it doesn't pass, it doesn't ship.

global.title: Sourced Worldwide
global.desc: We source from Vietnam, Turkey, and China — choosing factories based on output quality, not lowest price.

speed.title: Fast Delivery
speed.desc: Orders placed before 3pm ship same day. You'll get a tracking link the moment your pair leaves.

products.title: WHAT'S IN STOCK
products.description: Stock is limited and moves fast. Find your size, lock it in.

footer.brand_desc: Handpicked shoes, inspected before they ship. Based in Ethiopia, delivering nationwide.
footer.join_desc: New stock drops weekly. Leave your email and we'll tell you first — before it sells out.
footer.toast_welcome: You're in. We'll ping you when new stock drops.
